title: Sulfur and Potassium
description: Two new ores - craft more gunpowder!
body:
## Feature Overview - This mod adds two new blocks to Minecraft: Sulfur Ore and Potassium Ore. - It is meant to be a vanilla friendly way to craft more gunpowder. - Sulfur drops raw sulfur. It can be found in both overworld and nether. It has a higher spawn rate in the nether. - Potassium drops raw potassium, just other minerals, and can be smelted into potassium. It can only be found in the overworld - With 1 Sulfur and 1 Potassium you can craft 2 Gunpowder! ## Generation - Potassium spawns between y=[6, 56] and y=[70, max]. Larger ore veins are found in the highest part. - Overworld Sulfur spawns between y=[min, 5] (only in deepslate). - Nether Sulfur spawns everywhere and comes in larger ore veins ## Configuration Config is located in the `/config` folder as usual and it is called: `sulfurpotassiummod.json` Enabled/Disabled values are: `0` for disabled and `1` for enabled. ## Screenshots
Show
